TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Scott_Armstrong, title = Scott_Armstrong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Scott_Armstrong} }

S.FORM: Scott Armstrong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1913 , ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 10, Scott Armstrong, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1997) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Scott Armstrong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1913 , ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 10, Scott Armstrong, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1997) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~ɕʦ~ʨott arms~ɕtroŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, s~ɕʦ~ʨott arms~ɕtroŋ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
